extortion.description: OVER 12,000 IDS AND PASSPORTS OF CITIZENS OF DIFFERENT COUNTRIES WERE TAKEN  Coop57 is a financial instrument that is part of the fair and solidarity finance system. Its mission is to provide options to meet the diverse financial needs of citizens and actors in the social economy. To achieve this goal, Coop57 is integrated into a network of microfinance organizations and federations to jointly develop strategies for building a social and solidarity economy and creating alternative models of the economic cycle.
